facebookAccount.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 12; M2102J20SG) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/101.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
facebookAccount.notes: Automatically retrieves new cookies every x minutes. Recommended: 1440 (1 day).

noteSuperAdmin: Level 3 — Bot owners. Full control including adding/removing other super admins. These IDs also automatically become adminBot.

accountRotation.notes: Auto-switches to a backup Facebook account when current one is banned/blocked/restricted. Set enable:true to activate. Use /accounts command to manage.

stealth.notes: Human-camouflage system v2 — 10 layers. Randomizes presence, browses with real browser headers, marks messages as read, rotates user-agents, throttles outgoing messages, and enters burst-cooling when too active.
stealth.notesSleep: Hours (0-23) when bot simulates sleeping. Extended to 01:00-08:00 for stronger protection.
stealth.notesWarmup: After login, bot stays mostly offline for this many minutes to avoid looking suspicious.

outgoingThrottle.notes: Limits outgoing messages per thread and globally. Adds random delay when limits approached.

burstCooling.notes: If global rate limit is hit 3+ times in 25 min, bot enters a full cooling pause of 2-6 minutes.

noteAdminBot: Level 2 — Bot moderators. Can use all admin commands except super-admin-only actions.

humanTyping.notes: محاكاة الكتابة البشرية قبل كل رد. الإعدادات مُحسَّنة لتعكس سلوك إنسان حقيقي.
humanTyping.notesSpeed: سرعة الكتابة: 3.0–5.5 حرف/ثانية = 180–330 حرف/دقيقة (متوسط إنساني حقيقي). القيمة القديمة 14 كانت سريعة جداً.
humanTyping.notesJitter: عشوائية ناقوسية ±22% — أكثر واقعية من العشوائية الموحّدة.
humanTyping.notesReadPause: توقف قبل الكتابة لمحاكاة 'قراءة الرسالة الواردة' (0.5–2.2 ثانية).
humanTyping.notesThinkPause: توقف تفكير بين القراءة وبداية الكتابة (0.2–1.1 ثانية).
humanTyping.notesSentenceBreak: كل علامة وقف تُضيف توقفاً طبيعياً داخل الكتابة (350±200 ms).
humanTyping.notesTypo: 18% من الرسائل تُحاكي خطأ كتابة: المؤشر يتوقف ثم يعود (كأن الإنسان حذف وأعاد).
humanTyping.notesDistraction: 8% من الرسائل الطويلة تحتوي على توقف تشتت (3–8 ثواني) وسط الكتابة.
humanTyping.notesAttach: مدة مؤشر الكتابة للمرفقات (1.5–4 ثواني — وقت اختيار الملف).
humanTyping.notesFinal: جيتر نهائي صغير قبل الإرسال (0–350 ms) — الإنسان لا يضغط إرسال فوراً.

reactUnsend.notes: If enable = true, bot will unsend any message reacted with these emojis. If onlyAdmin = true, only adminBot IDs can trigger it.

whiteListMode.notes: If enabled, only IDs in whiteListIds can use the bot.

whiteListModeThread.notes: If enabled, only threads in whiteListThreadIds can use the bot.

antispam.notes: Kicks users who send more than maxMessages messages within timeWindowSeconds. action: 'warn' | 'kick'. Admins are exempt.

antiflood.notes: Detects repeated identical messages. deleteFlood removes them. kickOnFlood kicks the user. Admins are exempt.

antiImpersonation.notes: Detects users pretending to be admins by using admin-like names or prefixes.

autoUptime.notes: Time in seconds. Recommended for uptime monitors. Fixed: no longer causes double-execution.

restartListenMqtt.notes: Restart listener around every 15 min. jitterPercent=25 means 11-19 min range (randomized). Reduced frequency to lower bot fingerprint.

mqttHealthCheck.notes: Checks every 5-10 min (randomized). Restarts MQTT if silent for silentTimeoutMinutes. Reduced check frequency to lower API load.

notiWhenListenMqttError.notes: Notification settings when MQTT stops listening.

notes: Liberty Protocol — End-to-End Encryption for Messenger.
Set 'pin' to your Messenger PIN (the one you set for E2EE backup in Messenger).
The PIN is used to generate the bot's identity key pair via PBKDF2.
Works in: private DMs, encrypted groups, and regular groups.
Supports: X3DH key exchange + Double Ratchet (Signal Protocol), and PIN-based AES-256-GCM.
You can also set the pin via environment variable E2EE_PIN.
Commands: /e2ee status | handshake | pin <PIN> | end | verify | setpin <PIN> | sessions
Message format: Messages encrypted by Liberty Protocol are prefixed with 🔒E2EE:
